title: Dithered Ontology A
scene_prompt: A tilt-shift photograph of a 3D molecular knowledge graph sculpture rendered in the style of 1990s dithered computer graphics. The structure is a wide horizontal lattice of interconnected spherical nodes and thin metallic rods — dense interconnected cluster at center with sparser satellite groups branching left and right. Primary nodes are deep forest green (#0f4c3a) metallic. Accent nodes are teal (#00D1B2). A few warm brass gold (#F4A261) nodes at key junction points. The entire image has a heavy ordered dithering pattern applied — Bayer matrix style halftone dithering like an early SGI workstation or Amiga display rendering a 3D scene with limited color depth. The dithering creates a visible pixel grid texture across all surfaces and the background. Colors are reduced to a limited palette creating crosshatch-like dithering patterns in the gradients and shadows. The background is white with faint dithered green tint. Shallow depth of field with bokeh — but the bokeh itself is dithered and pixelated. The aesthetic is premium 3D product photography that has been deliberately processed through a retro ordered-dithering algorithm. Scientific visualization meets early 90s Silicon Graphics demo. No text, no logos, no UI elements.
palette: White dithered background; Forest Green #0f4c3a dithered nodes; Teal #00D1B2 accent; Brass #F4A261 highlights; visible Bayer dithering pattern throughout

title: Dithered Ontology B
scene_prompt: Macro product photograph of a three-dimensional knowledge graph model on a pure white background — but the entire image is rendered with heavy 1-bit ordered dithering like a classic Macintosh or early Sun workstation display. The graph structure has approximately 25 polished spherical nodes in deep forest green connected by thin dark rods, spreading horizontally with a central dense cluster and peripheral branches. The dithering effect reduces all smooth gradients to crosshatched dot patterns — metallic reflections on the spheres become geometric dithering patterns, shadows become stippled textures, the bokeh on out-of-focus elements becomes blocky pixel clusters. A few nodes have a warm amber glow that dithers into the surrounding green. The color palette is strictly limited: forest green, teal, warm gold, black, and white — with all intermediate tones created by dithering between these colors. The overall impression is a high-end 3D render displayed on vintage hardware — technically sophisticated content constrained by a deliberately lo-fi rendering pipeline. Contained in frame with generous whitespace. No text, no logos.
palette: Limited palette dithered: Forest Green #0f4c3a, Teal #00D1B2, Gold #C4944A, Black #1A1A1A, White #FAFAFA — all gradients via ordered dithering

title: Dithered Ontology C
scene_prompt: A knowledge graph rendered as a physical 3D molecular model photographed with studio lighting — then processed through a CRT phosphor and scanline filter giving it the look of a high-resolution 1990s SGI Onyx workstation display. The graph is a wide horizontal network of approximately 30 interconnected nodes and edges. Nodes are glossy dark green spheres of varying sizes. Connecting rods are thin gunmetal. A few key nodes glow with teal or amber light. The image has visible horizontal scanlines at low opacity, subtle RGB phosphor dot texture, and a characteristic slight bloom on bright highlights. Color banding is visible in smooth gradients giving a reduced bit-depth appearance. The green tones have that distinctive early CG warmth — slightly oversaturated forest green with CRT phosphor characteristics. The background is pale gray-white with faint scanline texture. Shallow depth of field creates soft bokeh that takes on the scanline and phosphor characteristics. The overall look is premium modern 3D content displayed through vintage high-end visualization hardware. No text, no logos, no UI chrome.
palette: CRT phosphor greens based on Forest Green #0f4c3a; teal #00D1B2 bloom highlights; amber #F4A261 glow points; scanline texture throughout; pale CRT white background
